failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, but required is 2804.8 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle pressures up to 2805 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Operating temperature close to solvent stability limit
failure_modes.mitigation: Monitor temperature closely and ensure cooling system is effective

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR with incremental pressure increase to ensure it can handle up to 2805 bar
Conduct thermal stability test of solvent at 120°C for extended periods
